'''Tem Chesko''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Spacer/Legends|cargo jockey]].

==Biography==

===Early life===
Tem Chesko was born around [[87 BBY/Legends|87 BBY]]<ref name="age">Chesko is described as 90 in [[Tales from Mos Eisley: Mostly Automatic]], which ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Early Victories]]'' places around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> He eventually had a girlfriend named [[Maia]].<ref name=":0">{{GalaxyCite|3|Tales from Mos Eisley: Mostly Automatic}}</ref>

===Travel of Doom===
[[File:Lex.jpg|left|thumb|250x250px|Tem Chesko speaking with [[Lex]], the last [[Human/Legends|Human]] he saw for a long time.]]
As a barely 22 year old man, Chesko took on a cargo of [[syntonium crystal]]s from [[Cirus II]],<ref name=":0" /> a planet in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name=":1">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]],<ref name=":0" /> on a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] known as [[The Crystal Passage/Legends|The Crystal Passage]].<ref name=":1" /> Before leaving he spoke with [[Lex]], the mine operator on Cirus II, telling him that he should arrive back on his home planet within two weeks. Tem got onto the ship, took off and relaxed, thinking that the following week where going to be nothing but playing hologames, watching vids and taking it easy.<ref name=":0" />

During his journey his ship was suddenly hit by an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]]. The collision took out the ship's [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], preventing Tem from contacting anyone. He calculated the distance to the nearest planet as ten [[Parsec/Legends|parsecs]]<ref name=":0" /> or about 310 trilion [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]],<ref name="Insider78">{{InsiderCite|78|Star Wars Q&A|Ask the Master}}</ref> meaning that he wouldn't arrive there in anything under 60 years. Tem lived on the ship for 8 years, becoming more insane with each passing day.<ref name=":0" /> [[File:CheskoDejarik.jpg|thumb|250x250px|Chesko plays [[Dejarik/Legends|Dejarik]] with [[Millie]].]]

Eventually he discovered a pane of glass to be broken in case of emergency. The drunken Tem threw his bottle at the glass, revealing a feminine, green [[MILL-247-EE industrial droid|MILL-247-EE industrial]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. The droid, who Tem named [[Millie]], took care of him and the ship for several years, until she spotted a planet on the view screen. Tem decided to land there, if only for some fresh air. Soon after landing, Tem was attacked by a massive, green [[Plant/Legends|plant]]-like monster, which was quickly shot down by Millie. As more years went by, Tem reminiscing about his old girlfriend [[Maia (Tem Chesko)|Maia]], whom he surmised was likely a grandmother by now.<ref name=":0" /> 

One morning, Tem woke up and noticed that the ship had landed somewhere again. He soon found Millie in a nearby pond, looking to short-circuit herself out of jealousy for Maia. Tem talked her out of it, and as he grew old and weak she continued to take care of him.<ref name=":0" /> 

At the age of 86, laying in his bed, Tem asked Millie to kill him, and handed her his [[Laser knife/Legends|laser knife]], remembering it as the hardest day of his life. Instead, Millie sacrificed herself to form [[Cybernetics/Legends|artificial organs]] from her internal complainants to keep him alive.<ref name=":0" /> 

===Arrival on Tatooine===
After several decades, Tem successfully completed his contract<ref name=":0" /> around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref>''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Early Victories]]'' dates [[Star Wars: Tales from Mos Eisley|''Star Wars: Tales from Mos Eisley'']] relative to the Battle of Yavin.</ref> By that point he had been absent from the galactic scene,<ref name=":0" /> which saw the unfoldings of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones">{{Film|II}}</ref> and the earliest stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope">{{Film|IV}}</ref> He would later tell his story to an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] named [[Bezzem]] in the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley cantina]]. To him, he revealed Millie's heart in replacement of his.<ref name=":0" />
